title: Attention
why_this_song: Attention by Charlie Puth (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "What are you doing to me?"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "'Cause you knew that I, knew that I"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "You just want attention; you don't want my heart"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You've been running 'round, running 'round"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "But you're not coming home with me tonight"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

'Cause you knew that I, knew that I
Knew that I'd call you up

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "doing" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: 'Cause you knew that I, knew that I
I knew from the start (The start)

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Attention" was released in 2017. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Attention" foi lançada em 2017. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
